source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/perivascular marker, and its high expression in DDX4 AB+ cells suggests perivascular-like identity in this sorted population
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells enriched in this population
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker gene characteristic of perivascular/contractile cells
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker commonly used to identify perivascular cells
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain, a definitive marker of smooth muscle lineage
Phospholamban (PLN) is expressed in smooth muscle/perivascular cells regulating calcium signaling
MYL9 is a myosin regulatory light chain expressed in smooth muscle and perivascular cells
Decorin (DCN) is a proteoglycan highly expressed in stromal/fibroblast cells of the ovary
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell marker in the ovarian stroma
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen, a hallmark of fibroblastic/stromal cells
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed in ovarian stromal cells
Osteoglycin (OGN) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of stromal fibroblasts
STAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) is involved in steroidogenesis in ovarian theca/stromal cells
HTRA1 is a serine protease expressed in ovarian stromal and theca cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor critical for vascular development
CLEC14A is a C-type lectin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
Aquaporin-1 is a water channel highly expressed in vascular endothelial cells
PALMD is enriched in endothelial cells and associated with vascular biology
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis
SPARCL1 is a matricellular protein highly expressed in vascular endothelial cells
GNG11 is a G-protein subunit enriched in endothelial cells
Anti-Müllerian hormone is a canonical marker of granulosa cells in growing ovarian follicles
TNNI3 has been identified as a marker of granulosa cells in ovarian tissue
WFDC2 (HE4) is expressed in granulosa cells and is a known ovarian biomarker
KRT18 is an epithelial cytokeratin expressed in granulosa cells reflecting their epithelial nature
GSTA1 is a glutathione S-transferase enriched in granulosa cells involved in detoxification
GATM is involved in creatine biosynthesis and is enriched in ovarian granulosa cells
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is highly expressed in granulosa cells and involved in follicular function
BEX1 is enriched in granulosa cells and involved in cell cycle regulation
HOPX is a homeodomain protein expressed in granulosa cells of the ovary
EMX2 is a transcription factor important for reproductive tract and granulosa cell development
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed on antigen-presenting immune cells
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain, a canonical marker of antigen-presenting immune cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for innate immune cell signaling
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and other immune cells
CD69 is an early activation marker expressed on activated immune cells
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid and NK immune cells
AIF1 (IBA1) is a calcium-binding protein expressed in macrophages and microglia
CD52 is a glycoprotein broadly expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes
Lysozyme is a canonical marker of myeloid immune cells
NKG7 is expressed in NK cells and cytotoxic T cells, marking cytotoxic immune populations
CD14 is the canonical monocyte/macrophage surface marker and LPS co-receptor
CD163 is a scavenger receptor specific to monocytes and tissue-resident macrophages
Lysozyme is highly expressed in monocytes and macrophages as part of innate immunity
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed in monocytes/macrophages
C1QB is a complement subunit characteristic of tissue-resident macrophages
C1QC completes the complement C1q complex, a hallmark of macrophage identity
MS4A7 is a membrane-spanning protein specifically expressed in monocytes/macrophages
Cathepsin S is a cysteine protease involved in MHC class II processing in monocytes
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/monocyte-specific calcium-binding protein
LYVE1 is a hyaluronan receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine predominantly produced by monocytes and macrophages
FGL2 (fibrinogen-like 2) is expressed by macrophages and involved in immune regulation
ZP3 encodes zona pellucida glycoprotein 3, a definitive oocyte-specific marker
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene essential for oocyte development
OOSP2 (oocyte secreted protein 2) is specifically expressed in oocytes
KPNA7 is an importin alpha specifically expressed in oocytes for nuclear transport
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor with oocyte-enriched expression
UCHL1 is a deubiquitinating enzyme highly expressed in oocytes and germ cells
EPCAM marks oocytes and germ cells in the ovarian context
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in perivascular cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte marker involved in cytoskeletal organization
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a definitive marker of pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain is specific to contractile perivascular/smooth muscle cells
Phospholamban regulates calcium handling in smooth muscle/perivascular cells
MCAM (CD146) is a well-established pericyte surface marker
MYL9 is a myosin light chain specific to smooth muscle/perivascular cells
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
RERGL is enriched in perivascular/smooth muscle cells in various tissues
Decorin is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan of stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell receptor tyrosine kinase
Type I collagen alpha-1 is a defining marker of fibroblastic stromal cells
Type I collagen alpha-2 chain is co-expressed with COL1A1 in stromal fibroblasts
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of ovarian stromal cells
Claudin-11 is expressed in ovarian stromal cells and involved in cell-cell adhesion
STAR mediates cholesterol transport for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca-stromal cells
APOE is expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in lipid metabolism
SERPINF1 (PEDF) is a secreted factor produced by stromal fibroblasts
TIMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase inhibitor characteristic of stromal cells
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex, a definitive T cell marker
CD2 is a T cell surface glycoprotein involved in T cell activation and adhesion
IL7R (CD127) is a key cytokine receptor marking T cells, especially naive and memory subsets
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly produced by effector and memory T cells
Granzyme K is a serine protease marking cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
Granzyme A is a cytotoxic granule protease characteristic of effector T cells
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells, marking cytotoxic lymphocytes
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker highly expressed on T cells
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine predominantly expressed by T cells and NK cells
CD52 is a GPI-anchored glycoprotein highly expressed on T lymphocytes
Interferon-gamma is the signature cytokine of activated T cells, especially Th1 and CD8+ T cells
CST7 (cystatin F) is expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
